Signal Forge

Report Generated at 8:09 PM PDT — 2026-04-05
Risk
Range-bound -> Defensive bias
Driver
US10Y holding above 4.3% keeps risk pinned
Confidence
Medium
Trigger
Sustained US10Y below 4.2% would reopen broader risk-on upside
Invalidation
Equities breaking higher despite firm yields would invalidate the current range-bound read
Drift
Stable — regime drivers intact, but tape quality still needs respect
Posture
Defensive
Focus
Trade smaller and shorter-term until yields roll over
Bias
Neutral -> slight defensive tilt
Expression
Fade strength, keep trades short-term, and stay selective on entries
Avoid
High-conviction directional positioning
What Matters Now
  • US10Y holding above 4.3% -> keeps pressure on risk assets
  • VIX falling -> no panic, but no momentum confirmation either
  • BTC firming -> speculative appetite is stabilizing at the margin
Key Signals Strip
DXY → | US10Y ↓ | VIX ↓ | Oil ↓ | Gold ↑ | BTC ↑
